mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, phone, email, status, org_id, must_change_password, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, nickname, phone, email, status, org_id, must_change_password, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{orgId}, #{mustChangePassword}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, org_id = #{orgId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, must_change_password = #{mustChangePassword}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
